text: Eating well, staying active, getting enough sleep, and looking after your mental health are all important parts of healthy living. A balanced diet means eating plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and proteins while limiting sugar and processed foods. Regular exercise, such as walking, cycling, or playing sports, helps keep your body strong and your mind clear. Sleep is just as vital – adults need around seven to nine hours each night to recharge. Finally, don't forget mental health and work-life balance. Taking breaks, managing stress, and making time for hobbies and loved ones can greatly improve your overall well-being.
